base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of battle_attack_animation — a character from 1987 final fantasy. Battle-view attack swing — 3-frame weapon-arc per class. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
